summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Carbon Footprint Calculator - Edit and Full View features. All requested features are working correctly: Total balance card opens full view modal, Edit button opens pre-filled entry modal, Scope-specific views work correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Test user has 6 activities across Scope 1 and Scope 3 Amont. Total emissions: 2,648,363.75 tCO2e.

navigate_to_data_entry.notes: Navigation to 'Saisie de données' page works

total_balance_card_opens_full_view.notes: Clicking Total balance card (data-testid='total-balance-card') opens 'Bilan complet' modal showing all 6 activities

full_view_shows_scope_column.notes: Full view modal shows Scope column with colored badges (Scope 1, Scope 3 Amont)

edit_button_opens_prefilled_modal.notes: Clicking edit button (pencil icon) in table view opens entry modal with pre-filled data

edit_modal_title.notes: Edit modal shows 'Modifier l'entrée' as title

edit_modal_update_button.notes: Edit modal shows 'Mettre à jour' button instead of 'Sauvegarder'

edit_modal_prefilled_data.notes: Edit modal has pre-selected category (Combustion mobile), subcategory (Voitures), unit (km), emission factor (Diesel B7), and quantity (12500)

scope_section_opens_specific_view.notes: Clicking on Scope 1 in sidebar opens scope-specific view showing only Scope 1 activities (3 entries)

scope_specific_view_filters.notes: Scope-specific view hides Scope column and shows only activities for that scope
